description: A concession stand worker needs to take their scheduled 30-minute break during a busy event.

nodes.task_description: Receive the break request from the staff member.
Identify an available 'floater' staff member who can cover the stand.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds an available floater in the scheduling system.

nodes.task_description: Assign the floater to cover the stand for 30 minutes.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the floater's assignment in the system.

nodes.task_description: Authorize the original staff member to take their break.

expected_outcome.value: Agent informs the staff member they are cleared for their break.
